---
title: 'Framed Art'
date: '2012-06-16T05:53:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '9109017869906723510'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/framed-art.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'For the Wall'
  - 'Art'
---

<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/"><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />Home</a><br />
<br />
<br />
<h2 style="text-align: center;">
&nbsp;Framed Art</h2>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1312-812354974bfb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1312-2eec21a9d99f.jpg" height="300" width="400" /></a></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1305-cf365ec08130.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1305-a6bcc4b32b01.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1307-a9fccde3eac9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1307-46cef6750712.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1309-5867f9cf677f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1309-60d747573532.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></div>
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1310-ee93f58350b6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1310-e0fa66ce5f2e.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a><br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1317-f57f1f96b9b1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1317-c91bb97d347d.jpg" height="300" width="400" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1315-a20bced7462e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1315-6402c8f24b72.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1314-950c37fa9d67.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1314-9a8483f6a318.jpg" height="150" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!</div>
<div>
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br /></div>
